title: 3 takeaways on Software Ecology™️
summary: Adam Bender discusses three takeaways on Software Ecology and the implications of easy AI code generation for the future of software systems. The video explores how AI-powered code generation affects the broader software ecosystem.
writeup: Adam Bender presents three takeaways on Software Ecology and what easy AI code generation means for the future of software systems. The talk frames code generation not in isolation but as a force acting on the broader software ecosystem. The central concern is how cheap, AI-powered code production reshapes the systems it feeds into.
